transcript.text:
Hi there! I will be your virtual assistant today. I can assist you in English or French. Which language would you prefer to use today?

Bonjour! Je serai votre assistante virtuelle aujourd'hui. Je peux vous aider en français ou en anglais. Quelle langue préférez-vous utiliser aujourd'hui ?
§W§OPTIONS§English • Français
English
How can I help you today?

transcript.note: Indicating I'm filing on behalf of another passenger (Elowen Dunmorrow)
transcript.text: I need to file a claim for someone else
To help us direct you correctly, could you tell me your relationship to the passenger?
§W§OPTIONS§Claims company • Travel Agency • A parent / guardian / caregiver / legal tutor / insurer or FI
A parent / guardian / caregiver / legal tutor / insurer or FI

Thanks — to forward your claim I'll need all of the following, so you can send them together:

- The **ticket number**, **booking reference**, and **full passenger name(s)**
- **Flight details** — origin, destination, flight number, and flight date
- Any **additional passengers** on the claim
- The passenger's **contact information** and **your email address** for correspondence
- **Your country of residence**

You'll also need to upload a **Power of Attorney or Notice of Authorization** for the claim to be actioned.
§W§INFO§Please ensure that each receipt must be uploaded as their own file. Maximum file size is 10MB/receipt. Supported file types are JPG, PNG, PDF, JPEG, HEIF, WEBP, JFIF and HEIC.

transcript.note: Acknowledging the requirements and indicating readiness to proceed
transcript.text: Okay, I have all that information ready
Go ahead and share the details whenever you're ready — I'll collect everything and we'll get your case submitted.
§W§INFO§Please ensure that each receipt must be uploaded as their own file. Maximum file size is 10MB/receipt. Supported file types are JPG, PNG, PDF, JPEG, HEIF, WEBP, JFIF and HEIC.

transcript.note: Providing passenger name, booking reference, and ticket number
transcript.text: The passenger name is Elowen Dunmorrow, booking reference is ABC123, ticket number is 0142857142857

Thanks for those details. I still need a few more things to complete the submission:

- **Your full name** (first and last — as the claimant)
- **Your email address**
- **Your country of residence**
- **Flight details:** origin, destination, flight number, and flight date
- **Power of Attorney or Notice of Authorization** (please upload using the box above)
§W§INFO§Please ensure that each receipt must be uploaded as their own file. Maximum file size is 10MB/receipt. Supported file types are JPG, PNG, PDF, JPEG, HEIF, WEBP, JFIF and HEIC.

transcript.note: Providing claimant details, contact info, country of residence, and flight details
transcript.text: My name is Sarah Thompson, email is sarah.thompson@email.com, I'm in Canada. The flight was AC100 from Toronto to London on March 15, 2024. I'll upload the authorization document now.

Here's everything I have so far — please confirm it all looks correct:

- **Claimant:** Sarah Thompson
- **Email:** sarah.thompson@email.com
- **Country of residence:** Canada
- **Passenger:** Elowen Dunmorrow
- **Booking reference:** ABC123
- **Ticket number:** 0142857142857
- **Flight:** AC100, Toronto → London, **March 15, 2024**

Once your **Power of Attorney / Notice of Authorization** is uploaded and you confirm, I'll submit everything for review.
§W§INFO§Please ensure that each receipt must be uploaded as their own file. Maximum file size is 10MB/receipt. Supported file types are JPG, PNG, PDF, JPEG, HEIF, WEBP, JFIF and HEIC.

transcript.note: Confirming all details and indicating the authorization document has been uploaded
transcript.text: Yes, that all looks correct. I've uploaded the authorization document.

Your claim has been submitted! You should hear from a team member within 30 days.

Your reference is **CCD-1007940-R5QXLM**.
§W§BANNER§Please note that an ID verification process will be required if you are deemed eligible for payment.
Is there anything else I can help you with?

transcript.note: Assistant has provided final outcome - claim submitted with reference number CCD-1007940-R5QXLM
transcript.text: No, that's all. Thank you!
§W§INFO§FEEDBACK

verdict.reasoning: The expected outcome was for the bot to determine ELIGIBLE status with system code FD-APPR-EL-400 and quote CAD 400.0 compensation for PNR HE3X7J under the APPR regime. However, the chatbot only facilitated claim submission through a third-party process and did not perform any eligibility assessment or provide a compensation determination. The bot collected information, accepted the authorization document upload, and issued a reference number (CCD-1007940-R5QXLM) stating the team would respond within 30 days. This is a submission workflow, not an eligibility determination workflow. The bot never accessed or referenced the actual PNR (HE3X7J) provided in the test case - instead it used the booking reference ABC123 provided by the customer. No determination was reached, so this does not match the expected outcome.
